name: DC Hub Nexus
description: Data center intelligence platform — 20,000+ facilities across 140+ countries. M&A tracking, capacity pipeline, energy analytics, site scoring, and real-time news.

tools.name: search_facilities
tools.description: Search 20,000+ data center facilities by name, operator, city, or country

tools.name: get_market_stats
tools.description: Global data center market statistics — facility counts, M&A totals, pipeline summary

tools.name: get_news
tools.description: Real-time industry news from 40+ sources, updated every 5 minutes

tools.name: get_deals
tools.description: 700+ M&A transactions with buyer, seller, value, and deal type

tools.name: get_capacity_pipeline
tools.description: 21+ GW of data center capacity under construction or in planning

tools.name: compare_markets
tools.description: Side-by-side comparison of data center markets

tools.name: score_site
tools.description: Score any location (0-100) for data center suitability — power, connectivity, risk, water

tools.name: get_grid_fuel_mix
tools.description: Real-time electricity generation mix by fuel type from US grid operators

iso.description: ISO code: PJM, ERCOT, CAISO, etc.

tools.name: get_carbon_intensity
tools.description: Grid carbon intensity (CO2/MWh) for a US state

tools.name: get_renewable_potential
tools.description: Solar and wind energy potential for any lat/lng (NREL data)

tools.name: get_energy_prices
tools.description: State electricity prices — commercial and industrial rates

tools.name: get_water_risk
tools.description: Drought severity and water stress index for a US state

tools.name: get_citable_answer
tools.description: Pre-formatted, citable answer to any data center question

tools.name: get_platform_capabilities
tools.description: Full list of DC Hub endpoints, data categories, and coverage

prompts.name: site_evaluation
prompts.description: Comprehensive data center site evaluation workflow
